name: Download Messages
messages: Dragon's Hoard is in the Arena - Handmade Beard Merch
For those about to rock, we salute you
Its a short way, to the arena, if you want to rock n roll
Check out the village for food, fun, and bumper cars!
Did you see the wrestling? Who doesn't love spandex
New LP is better than old LP? Go
Check out Chishill Boy on all streaming platforms
Like KteePee? You can use it at your next event!
4 Stages, 30k family, lets have it people!
Look after your mates, don't make them look after you!
Dragons Hoard have the best hand made beard oils
If you’re exploring, purple camp is the best!
ROADHOUSE!! IYKYK
EVERYONE here is family, say helo!
Drink lots of water, stay hydrated.
Don't forget to eat something!
Be kind to your camp neighbours, everyone deserves to have fun
Say hello to the person on your left!!
Imaginie counting the number of times you'd nodded out a headbang this week...
Andy's Man Club - It's Okay To Talk
